The '''super-vaporator''' was a highly experimental version of the standard [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporator]] used to wrench moisture from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] air. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Egoreg]] was in charge of an effort to enrich [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with moisture in the midst of a severe drought. To that end, the team began building a super-vaporator. Due to an untimely [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] raid, the project was temporarily delayed.<ref name="Rebellious Robot" />

{{Tech-stub}}
